fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Cloudflare user API token or account API token sent as a Bearer token. User tokens are verified through /user/tokens/verify; account tokens are verified through the configured account ID.

fields.label: Account ID
fields.description: Cloudflare account ID used for Workers API requests. Find it in the Cloudflare dashboard or account ID docs: https://developers.cloudflare.com/fundamentals/account/find-account-and-zone-ids/

mainModuleContent.description: The source content for the Worker entry module.

mainModuleContentType.description: The MIME type for the Worker entry module part.

bindingsInherit.description: Require inherited bindings to resolve against the previous Worker version.

name.description: The multipart part name and file name for this Worker module.

content.description: The source content for this Worker module.

contentType.description: The MIME type for this Worker module part.

items.description: A module file to upload with a Worker script.

modules.description: Additional module files to upload with the Worker script.

bindings.description: Bindings to expose in the Worker.
